text:
Once upon a time in the quaint village of Whispering Springs, there lived an old owl named Oliver. Oliver had lived in the same hollow for as many moons as anyone could measure. His knowledge was profound, his feathers always tidy, and his wings silent. On rainy days, he'd read aloud from the ancient tomes in his library.

Every spring, the villagers would take a day off just to listen to Oliver. He'd regale them with stories of dragons past and stars fallen from the sky. His tales were legendary.

One particular spring, Oliver started a new story about a legendary wanderer named Aurora. Aurora journeyed far and wide, seeking wisdom from various creatures until she discovered the power to speak fluent bird.

However, she longed for home. One night, a cold wind swept across Whispering Springs, and Aurora found herself far away from her nest. Worried, she began her search anew but soon realized how much she had forgotten.
